meta.title: Minimal Portfolio
meta.description: Extreme restraint and intentional whitespace with modern responsive layouts

sections.headline: Design matters
sections.subheadline: I create digital experiences with intention and restraint. Every element earns its place. Every pixel serves a purpose. Less, but better.

sections.body:
I believe in the power of subtraction. Every element should earn its place. Every pixel should serve a purpose. This philosophy guides everything I create—from brand identities to digital products.

Based in San Francisco, I work with companies who value craft over trends, substance over style, and long-term thinking over quick wins. My work has been featured in Awwwards, CSS Design Awards, and Communication Arts.

items.title: Stripe Design System
items.description: Led the redesign of Stripe's component library, focusing on accessibility and developer experience. Created comprehensive documentation and migration guides.

items.title: Linear Brand Identity
items.description: Created the visual identity for Linear, including logo, typography system, and brand guidelines. Established a cohesive design language across all touchpoints.

items.title: Vercel Website
items.description: Redesigned Vercel's marketing site with focus on performance and developer experience. Achieved 98/100 Lighthouse score and sub-second load times.

items.title: Notion Brand Refresh
items.description: Refreshed Notion's visual identity while maintaining brand recognition. Updated color palette, typography, and illustration style for modern appeal.

items.title: Figma Plugin Ecosystem
items.description: Designed and built a suite of Figma plugins used by 50K+ designers. Focused on discoverability, performance, and seamless integration.

items.quote: Their work is characterized by remarkable restraint and intentionality. Every decision feels considered and purposeful.
items.name: Design Jury
